chapter_title: Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
text:
It is a defense to prosecution or suit for a violation under this chapter if at the time of the alleged violation the defendant is a candidate for elective public office and the sign is placed:

(1) by a person other than the defendant; and

(2) in connection with a campaign for an elective public office by the defendant.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.036 — Defense

It is a defense to prosecution or suit for a violation under this chapter if at the time of the alleged violation the defendant is a candidate for elective public office and the sign is placed:

    (1) by a person other than the defendant; and

    (2) in connection with a campaign for an elective public office by the defendant.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 612 (H.B.413), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2007.*

subsections.text: It is a defense to prosecution or suit for a violation under this chapter if at the time of the alleged violation the defendant is a candidate for elective public office and the sign is placed:
by a person other than the defendant; and
in connection with a campaign for an elective public office by the defendant.
